CardDescription.DefaultText: A woven reed tray with fine mesh for drying smaller herbs and plant materials. Can hold up to 3 items at once.

CardHelpSection.DefaultText: Capacity: Holds 3 small items for drying Use: Ideal for drying frostleaf, cut fireroot, appleweed, hemp flowers, and other small herbs. Benefits: Mesh design allows maximum airflow for faster drying.

ActionDescription.DefaultText: Take apart the tray to recover materials.
